mechanism: The 25-30% unconditional recession probability in any 18-month window heavily favors the demand-dominant (negative correlation) mode of the bimodal distribution, since correlation goes sharply negative in every recession since 1990, potentially making the 55-60% Regime D probability weight understated.
regime_dependence: Always relevant as a background base rate. Becomes more critical when leading indicators (ISM, claims, credit spreads) begin activating in the signpost hierarchy.
